result:
The cleaned data has been successfully created and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The script performed the following operations:

1. Loaded all 4 wave files from data/input/ using readr::read_delim with tab delimiter
2. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID variable
3. Standardized missing value codes according to metadata:
   - -999, -99, -98 -> -3 (Not asked)
   - -94 -> -8 (Don't know)
   - -92 -> -9 (Refusal)
   - -996 -> -1 (Item not applicable)
   - NA -> -3 (Not asked)
4. Created age-specific parental employment variables:
   - ecoactdtma14, ecoactdtpa14 (age 14)
   - ecoactdtma15, ecoactdtpa15 (age 15)
   - ecoactdtma16, ecoactdtpa16 (age 16)
   - ecoactdtma17, ecoactdtpa17 (age 17)
5. Created collapsed harmonised versions with 6 categories:
   - 1 = Paid work, 2 = Unemployed, 3 = Training, 4 = Education, 5 = Home/Retired/Sick, 6 = Other
   - ecoactdtma14_coll, ecoactdtpa14_coll, etc.
6. Output includes NSID and all derived variables (18 total columns)
